spec_match.rationale: The page accurately explains the parent attribute plus child response header double opt-in.

interactive.rationale: A live probe checks the iframe IDL surface and the server-served Supports-Responsive-Sizing header, with a rerun control.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the conceptual opt-in walkthrough framing in the feature index.

edge_cases.rationale: Explains the security model and now surfaces browser support and header availability directly.

design_system.rationale: Uses standard showcase styles and tokenized colors.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: The static walkthrough now includes a live capability and header probe, answering the open interactivity critique.
